name: autodl-remote
description: Bash-only SSH account, command, upload, download, job, and shutdown tool layer for AutoDL.

interface.shortDescription: Control AutoDL over SSH from local Codex.
interface.longDescription: Provides SSH account management, remote command execution, explicit file upload/download primitives, remote job tracking, script execution, and shutdown handling. Codex decides what to inspect, push, pull, and run.
defaultPrompt: Use AutoDL Remote to inspect my remote project.
Upload this edited file to AutoDL and run training.
Tail the latest AutoDL training log.
Check the status of my detached AutoDL job.
Shut down the remote AutoDL machine when the run is finished.
